[[Marley Leuluai]] (cousin) }} }} '''Macgraff David E. Leuluai''' (born 9 February 1990) is a [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} or {{rlp|lf}}. ==Background== He was born in [[Wakefield]], [[West Yorkshire]], [[England]].{{fact|date=January 2024}} His father, [[James Leuluai|James]], and his brother, [[Thomas Leuluai|Thomas]], have both represented [[New Zealand national rugby league team|New Zealand]] and he is part of a wider Leuluai family that includes [[Phillip Leuluai|Phillip]] and [[Kylie Leuluai|Kyle]].{{fact|date=January 2024}} ==Playing career== Born in [[Wakefield]] while his father was playing for [[Wakefield Trinity]], Leuluai was a [[Newcastle Knights]] junior before joining [[Leigh Centurions]] as an 18-year-old in 2009.[http://menmedia.co.uk/manchestereveningnews/sport/rugby_league/s/1090741_leuluai_signs_for_leigh Leuluai signs for Leigh] ''Manchester Evening News'', 15 January 2009 As he was born in Wakefield, Leuluai does not require a work permit to play in England and does not count on the overseas quota.{{fact|date=January 2024}} Leuluai joined [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] in 2011 on a one-year contract. This was later extended to a [[Super League]] deal ending in 2013.[http://www.runcornandwidnesweeklynews.co.uk/widnes-vikings/widnes-vikings-news/2011/07/21/widnes-vikings-macgraff-leuluai-signs-super-league-deal-55368-29088922/ Macgraff Leuluai signs Super League deal] ''Runcorn & Widnes Weekly News'', 21 June 2011 On 19 August 2020 it was announced that Leuluai would leave [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] at the end of the 2020 season{{cite web|url=https://www.runcornandwidnesworld.co.uk/sport/18661952.widnes-vikings-trio-leave-club/|title=Widnes Vikings trio to leave the club|publisher=Runcorn and Widnes World|date=19 Aug 2020|accessdate=21 Dec 2020}} ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.widnesvikings.co.uk/club/teams/player_profile?519385-macgraff-leuluai Widnes Vikings profile] *[http://www.rugby-league.com/superleague/player-info/10237 SL profile] {{DEFAULTSORT:Leuluai, Macgraff}} [[Category:1990 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:English people of New Zealand descent]] [[Category:Leigh Leopards players]] [[Category:Leuluai family|Macgraff]] [[Category:New Zealand rugby league players]] [[Category:New Zealand expatriate rugby league players in England]] [[Category:North Wales Crusaders players]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Wakefield]] [[Category:Rugby league props]] [[Category:Rugby league second-rows]] [[Category:Whitehaven R.L.F.C. players]] [[Category:Widnes Vikings players]] [[Category:Workington Town players]]
